description.en: Field title for the customer-service contacts in site settings
description.zh: 站点设置中『客服联系方式』的字段标题

description.en: Site settings: when on, hide all recharge/top-up entries on this site
description.zh: 站点设置：开启后隐藏本站所有充值/购买入口

description.en: Help text for the disable-recharge toggle
description.zh: 禁用充值开关的说明文字

description.en: Login provider display name: Sign in with Apple.
description.zh: 登录方式名称：Sign in with Apple；保留英文品牌名 'Apple' 不翻译

message.en: When enabled, this site's phone verification codes are sent through your own endpoint under your own signature; disable it to use the platform default. Requires the phone-number login provider to be enabled.
message.zh: 开启后，本站发出的手机验证码短信将由你自己的接口用你自己的签名发送；关闭则使用平台默认签名。需先启用「手机号」登录方式。

description.en: Placeholder for the SMS webhook URL input
description.zh: 短信 webhook URL 输入框占位

message.en: Signing secret (leave blank to keep unchanged)
message.zh: 签名密钥（留空则保持不变）

message.en: Enable the phone-number login provider first to configure a custom SMS sender.
message.zh: 需先启用「手机号」登录方式才能配置自定义短信发件地址。

message.en: Custom SMS Sender · Webhook spec
message.zh: 自定义短信发件地址 · 接口说明

message.en: This site sends a signed HTTPS POST to the URL you provide; your service is responsible for delivering the SMS. Your endpoint must meet the following requirements:
message.zh: 本站会向你填写的地址发起一次带签名的 HTTPS POST 请求，由你的服务负责下发短信。请确保你的接口满足以下要求：

message.en: Method POST, Content-Type application/json. purpose is one of login / register / test (test is a connectivity probe — you may skip actually sending). The request body looks like:
message.zh: 方法为 POST，Content-Type 为 application/json。purpose 可能为 login / register / test（test 为连通性测试，可不实际下发短信）。请求体结构如下：

message.en: Signature verification
message.zh: 签名校验

message.en: Each request carries the headers below. Verify with your signing secret using HMAC-SHA256 per the Standard Webhooks spec and compare in constant time:
message.zh: 每次请求附带以下请求头，请用你的签名密钥按 Standard Webhooks 规范做 HMAC-SHA256 校验，并使用常量时间比较：

message.en: Return 2xx on success. To signal failure explicitly, return HTTP 200 with a JSON body whose success field is false (see the example below). Respond within 5 seconds.
message.zh: 下发成功请返回 2xx；如需显式表示失败，可返回 HTTP 200，且 body 中 success 字段为 false（见下方示例）。请在 5 秒内响应。

message.en: Test custom SMS sender
message.zh: 测试自定义短信发件地址

message.en: Test phone number (optional)
message.zh: 测试手机号（选填）

message.en: The test request was delivered to your endpoint successfully.
message.zh: 测试请求已成功送达你的接口。

message.en: Test failed. Check the URL, signing secret, and your endpoint's response.
message.zh: 测试失败，请检查地址、签名密钥与接口返回。

message.en: Disable custom SMS sender
message.zh: 关闭自定义短信发件地址

message.en: Disabling this deletes the saved sender URL and signing secret (the secret cannot be recovered), and this site falls back to the platform default signature. Disable it?
message.zh: 关闭后将删除已保存的发件地址与签名密钥（密钥不可恢复），本站将改用平台默认签名。确定关闭吗？

description.en: Displayed as the title in the editing box
description.zh: 展示在编辑框的标题

description.en: Displayed as the title in the editing box
description.zh: 展示在编辑框的标题

description.en: Title of the edit-support-contacts dialog
description.zh: 编辑客服联系方式弹窗的标题

description.en: Tip for the support-contacts field
description.zh: 客服联系方式字段的提示

description.en: Placeholder shown when no support contact has been filled in
description.zh: 未填写任何客服联系方式时的占位文案

description.en: Concise capability introduction: xAI assistant for real-time knowledge, reasoning, writing, and coding.
description.zh: xAI 智能助手，提供实时信息、推理、写作和编程能力。的能力简介

description.en: Concise capability introduction: xAI video generation for short clips from text prompts or reference images.
description.zh: xAI 视频生成服务，可根据文字提示或参考图制作短片。的能力简介

description.en: Concise capability introduction: Produce complete videos from an idea, including planning, voiceover, scenes, and delivery.
description.zh: 将创意制作成完整视频，覆盖策划、配音、场景生成和交付。的能力简介

description.en: Concise capability introduction: Create talking-head videos with synthesized speech and natural lip sync.
description.zh: 使用合成语音和自然口型同步制作数字人口播视频。的能力简介

description.en: Concise capability introduction: DeepSeek assistant for advanced reasoning, coding, math, and everyday questions.
description.zh: DeepSeek 智能助手，擅长深度推理、编程、数学和日常问答。的能力简介

description.en: Concise capability introduction: OpenAI assistant for writing, reasoning, coding, and multimodal conversations.
description.zh: OpenAI 智能助手，擅长写作、推理、编程和多模态对话。的能力简介

description.en: Concise capability introduction: Create polished images and creative variations from text or visual references.
description.zh: 根据文字或参考图生成精美图像与创意变体。的能力简介

description.en: Concise capability introduction: Turn links into scannable artistic QR codes with custom styles and imagery.
description.zh: 将链接制作成可扫描的艺术二维码，支持自定义风格与图像。的能力简介

description.en: Concise capability introduction: Google video generation for cinematic clips with strong prompt and motion control.
description.zh: Google 视频生成服务，擅长电影感画面、提示理解和运动控制。的能力简介

description.en: Concise capability introduction: OpenAI video generation for realistic scenes, storytelling, and visual transformations.
description.zh: OpenAI 视频生成服务，适合真实场景、故事表达和视觉变换。的能力简介

description.en: Concise capability introduction: Generate complete songs, lyrics, vocals, and instrumentals from a prompt.
description.zh: 根据提示生成完整歌曲、歌词、人声和纯音乐。的能力简介

description.en: Concise capability introduction: Generate stylized videos from prompts and images with templates and effects.
description.zh: 根据提示和图像生成风格化视频，并提供模板与特效。的能力简介

description.en: Concise capability introduction: Create detailed images and edit existing visuals with natural-language instructions.
description.zh: 生成细节丰富的图像，并通过自然语言编辑现有画面。的能力简介

description.en: Concise capability introduction: Google-powered image generation and editing with precise instruction following.
description.zh: Google 驱动的图像生成与编辑，能够精准遵循修改指令。的能力简介

description.en: Concise capability introduction: OpenAI image generation and editing for polished visuals, text, and compositions.
description.zh: OpenAI 图像生成与编辑，擅长精美画面、文字和版式设计。的能力简介

description.en: Concise capability introduction: ByteDance image generation and editing for high-quality creative visuals.
description.zh: 字节跳动图像生成与编辑服务，用于创作高质量视觉内容。的能力简介

description.en: Concise capability introduction: ByteDance video generation for dynamic scenes, camera motion, and optional audio.
description.zh: 字节跳动视频生成服务，支持动态场景、镜头运动和可选音频。的能力简介

description.en: Concise capability introduction: Alibaba video generation from text, images, or references at multiple resolutions.
description.zh: 阿里巴巴视频生成服务，支持文字、图像、参考素材和多种分辨率。的能力简介

description.en: Concise capability introduction: Create songs, covers, extensions, and vocal or instrumental variations.
description.zh: 创作歌曲、翻唱和续写，并生成不同人声或纯音乐版本。的能力简介

description.en: Concise capability introduction: Moonshot AI assistant for long-context research, reasoning, writing, and coding.
description.zh: 月之暗面智能助手，擅长长上下文研究、推理、写作和编程。的能力简介

description.en: Concise capability introduction: Search the web, images, news, maps, and videos with structured Google results.
description.zh: 搜索网页、图片、新闻、地图和视频，返回结构化 Google 结果。的能力简介

description.en: Concise capability introduction: Generate natural speech and clone voices for multilingual audio production.
description.zh: 生成自然语音并克隆音色，用于多语言音频制作。的能力简介

description.en: Concise capability introduction: Connect AI coding assistants to local projects for guided development workflows.
description.zh: 将 AI 编程助手连接到本地项目，完成引导式开发工作流。的能力简介

description.en: Concise capability introduction: Extract clean, structured content and data from web pages.
description.zh: 从网页中提取干净、结构化的内容和数据。的能力简介

description.en: Concise capability introduction: Create cinematic videos from text or images with natural motion.
description.zh: 根据文字或图像生成具有自然运动效果的电影感视频。的能力简介

description.en: Concise capability introduction: Generate and edit short creative videos with effects, scenes, and transformations.
description.zh: 生成和编辑创意短视频，支持特效、场景与画面变换。的能力简介

description.en: Concise capability introduction: Create high-quality videos from text, images, or motion references.
description.zh: 根据文字、图像或动作参考生成高质量视频。的能力简介

description.en: Concise capability introduction: Generate expressive videos from text or images with smooth character motion.
description.zh: 根据文字或图像生成表现力丰富、人物动作流畅的视频。的能力简介

description.en: Concise capability introduction: Google assistant for long-context reasoning, research, coding, and multimodal work.
description.zh: Google 智能助手，擅长长上下文推理、研究、编程和多模态任务。的能力简介

description.en: Concise capability introduction: Anthropic assistant for careful reasoning, writing, coding, and document analysis.
description.zh: Anthropic 智能助手，擅长严谨推理、写作、编程和文档分析。的能力简介

description.en: Tooltip on the auto-translate toggle when it is ON
description.zh: 自动翻译切换按钮在开启状态下的 hover 提示

description.en: Tooltip on the auto-translate toggle when it is OFF
description.zh: 自动翻译切换按钮在关闭状态下的 hover 提示

description.en: Tooltip shown when the toggle is disabled because the row has no id yet (create-dialog state)
description.zh: 在创建对话框中（尚未保存）按钮被禁用的提示

description.en: Body text of the confirm dialog shown before enabling auto-translation
description.zh: 点击开启自动翻译时的二次确认弹窗正文

description.en: Body text of the confirm dialog shown before disabling auto-translation
description.zh: 点击关闭自动翻译时的二次确认弹窗正文

description.en: Warning shown when the user tries to enable auto-translation on an empty field
description.zh: 字段为空时尝试开启自动翻译的警告提示

description.en: Fallback error toast when the enable/disable HTTP call fails with no detail
description.zh: 切换自动翻译接口返回错误时的兜底文案

description.en: Tooltip and accessible label for editing a capability app name and icon
description.zh: 编辑能力应用名称和图标的提示与无障碍标签

message.en: Customize {name}
message.zh: 自定义 {name}

description.en: Dialog title; {name} is the platform-default capability app name
description.zh: 弹窗标题，{name} 为平台默认应用名称

description.en: Field label for a per-site capability app display name
description.zh: 子站能力应用显示名称字段

message.en: Leave blank to use {name}. Save once before enabling automatic translation.
message.zh: 留空则使用 {name}。首次保存后可开启自动翻译。

description.en: Help text; {name} is the platform-default capability app name
description.zh: 名称说明，{name} 为平台默认应用名称

description.en: Field label for a per-site capability app icon
description.zh: 子站能力应用图标字段

description.en: Label above the platform-default capability icon preview
description.zh: 平台默认图标预览标签

description.en: Label above the effective capability icon preview
description.zh: 当前生效图标预览标签

description.en: Command to upload a replacement capability icon
description.zh: 上传替换图标的命令

description.en: Command to upload the first custom capability icon
description.zh: 首次上传自定义图标的命令

description.en: Command to clear the custom icon draft
description.zh: 清除自定义图标草稿的命令

message.en: PNG, JPEG, or WebP. The image is cropped to a square; transparent PNG is preserved.
message.zh: 支持 PNG、JPEG 或 WebP，将裁剪为正方形；透明 PNG 会保留透明背景。

description.en: Capability icon upload requirements
description.zh: 能力应用图标上传要求

description.en: Title of the capability icon cropper dialog
description.zh: 图标裁剪弹窗标题

description.en: Command that removes both custom name and icon
description.zh: 同时删除自定义名称和图标的命令

message.en: Enter a custom name or upload an icon first.
message.zh: 请先输入自定义名称或上传图标。

description.en: Warning when attempting to create an empty override
description.zh: 尝试创建空覆盖时的提示

message.en: App customization saved
message.zh: 应用自定义已保存

description.en: Success message after saving a capability override
description.zh: 保存能力应用覆盖后的成功提示

message.en: Saved. You can now enable automatic translation for the custom name.
message.zh: 已保存，现在可以为自定义名称开启自动翻译。

description.en: Success message after first save creates an override ID
description.zh: 首次保存并获得覆盖记录 ID 后的提示

message.en: Failed to save app customization
message.zh: 保存应用自定义失败

description.en: Fallback error for capability override writes
description.zh: 能力应用覆盖写入失败的兜底错误

message.en: Restore the default name and icon for {name}?
message.zh: 恢复 {name} 的默认名称和图标？

description.en: Confirmation message; {name} is the platform-default capability app name
description.zh: 恢复确认文案，{name} 为平台默认应用名称

message.en: Default name and icon restored
message.zh: 已恢复默认名称和图标

description.en: Success message after deleting a capability override
description.zh: 删除能力应用覆盖后的成功提示

message.en: Failed to load app customizations
message.zh: 加载应用自定义失败

description.en: Error shown when capability override management rows cannot be loaded
description.zh: 无法读取能力应用覆盖管理记录时的错误
